final:
module top_module(output reg [7:0] reg_0x18, input wire reset, input wire wenb, input wire [7:0] in_data, input wire clk);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always@(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt)
	begin
		if(reset==1) begin
			reg_0x18<=8'h00;
		end
		else if(wenb==0) begin
			reg_0x18<=in_data;
		end
	end
endmodule
